The situation they called in and all they did was got a human being. I would never have a recorder answer my telephone office. And I had a human being that talked to them and said that we would send you the literature out and you will be assigned a program advisor that will work with you to find out which programs you're interested in. Because we had 42 different businesses you could run from your home with a computer at the end. We started with three. Then I found out that they would like to know the company is growing all the time. Also there were businesses that I thought we could start to put on to that. So we added about two a year. Maybe a little more now. We added four or five a year I guess. And we added businesses all the time. And the concept is very simple and I want you to get it because it's important. My whole theory in business is when a man and wife came to me and were talking about putting ten thousand dollars out to start a business. She most of the time said I know we'd like to start a business. But John do you remember that when we start the business and it fails we just spent ten thousand dollars we don't have? And I know that was the question because it was a question to me at one time. My wife and I both answered that question when we started the business. I was bankrupt at the time. And so I asked. Forgot where I was again. Was there concern about losing ten thousand dollars. Thank you. You're welcome. I lost my train of thought. I'm sorry. It's all right. We'll come back to my six is bothered. Once my seventy six is bothered. It's all right. So we'll come back to it. So process they call in. They talk to a human. They get sent the stuff. They're pre-assigned to program advisor. Thank you. That's where I was going. There you go. They were we told them they were signed to program advisor. The program advisor as soon as the the the the request got in the program advisor sent them a letter with a special number they were to call the program advisors individually at other than the office if they needed it in any time they could call that number. The program advisors were mostly people that I knew. All three of my sons were. They basically my tape was my CD was so good if any of you have a desire to have that CD. I'd be glad to make them up and whatever they cost me I'll send them to you. I don't I don't I don't know I haven't done that yet but I have we have the one CDs now. They were on cassettes but I had a man put them on CDs. Basically use as an examples because the way that was done was very good even though I did it myself. It was just it was just natural and what I what I wanted to do is to get them to like me and my my family and I in the process and when we I was explaining to Dan today one of the biggest things we did is we opened our farm I live on a farm built in 1835 in Indiana and we've been there for 47 45 years and we've added something to it every year for 45 years and it now has everything on it and so we would everybody started in our business I invited number one every Saturday this is important I want you to understand I met with the people who ever wanted to come in that Saturday and I would talk with them for three about three hours so about I think was nine to twelve and then we fed them lunch and then the program advisors were there and then they they worked with them on what program they wanted but I was I gave a presentation for about two hours about all the different things that I wanted to talk about and then I opened it up for questions and let them ask questions and then we ended it after that we took them over to the house to see the farm and fed them lunch my wife has been with a pitch man like myself meaning me for ever since she was 15 and she knows what to do she knows when to smile and when not to smile and she's wonderful um and she's also very honest and so she would work talk to the people and answer any questions they wanted and that helped them but they understood I asked my son the other day why he thinks that we are I guess I should say was so successful he said dad he's 53 now he said dad they trusted you they believed that you really believed what you were talking about now sometimes we thought you were crazy but they still followed you and they followed you because they knew that you were doing what you thought at the time was the correct thing to do and I will thank you Matthew because that's what I wanted to think well what else well we should make the point and it's an important point that comparatively few ever came but the fact that they could come about 20 a week came we sold 100 a week but the fact that they could come is a great reassurance factor so how big did this thing get 52 million a million a week million a week um and this is when I died yeah above before yeah and so well nothing lasts forever um um and and this was what years we weren't talking about that worry no and this was what years what the years years
